<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-tiū]][[de:Feuer-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de feu]][[hak:Tên-chhiú]][[ja:丁丑]][[ko:정축]][[nds:Füür-Oss]][[vi:Đinh Sửu]][[za:Dingcouj]][[zh_classical:丁丑]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-thiú]][[zh-yue:丁丑]][[zh:丁丑]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-tiū]][[de:Feuer-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de feu]][[hak:Tên-chhiú]][[ja:丁丑]][[ko:정축]][[nds:Füür-Oss]][[vi:Đinh Sửu]][[za:Dingcouj]][[zh_classical:丁丑]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-thiú]][[zh-yue:丁丑]][[zh:丁丑]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-tiū]][[de:Feuer-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de feu]][[hak:Tên-chhiú]][[ja:丁丑]][[ko:정축]][[nds:Füür-Oss]][[vi:Đinh Sửu]][[za:Dingcouj]][[zh-classical:丁丑]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-thiú]][[zh-yue:丁丑]][[zh:丁丑]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Ox|kanji=丁丑|romaji=hinoto ushi|onyomi=teichū|p=dīngchǒu|w=ting-ch'ou|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 chau2|j=deng1 chau2|ci=tɛŋ tsʰɐu̯|mc=tæŋ tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=tæŋ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Ox also known as  Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingzi|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingzi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wuyin|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}’ {{ill|Ox|ja|丑|1=chǒu|lt=Ox (丑)|2=ja|3=丑|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (丑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire generates Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Ox (丁丑)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-ushi
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: teichū
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongchuk (정축)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Sửu

<!--
==
* Yin Fire Ox (丁丑) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: ひのとうし (hinoto-ushi)
***Onyomi: ていかのうし (teika-no-ushi)
***Onyomi: ていちゅう (teichū)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongchuk
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Sửu

-->
==Years of Yin Fire Ox==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 17 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=Year|1=Year}} of Teichuu.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Teichuu'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 17|en|AD 17|WD=Q23602|lt=17 AD|1=AD 17}}
* {{ill|AD 77|en|AD 77|WD=Q30420|lt=77 AD|1=AD 77}}
* {{ill|AD 137|en|AD 137|WD=Q30648|lt=137 AD|1=AD 137}}
* {{ill|197|en|197|WD=Q30065|lt=197 AD|1=197}}
* {{ill|257|en|257|WD=Q33737|lt=257 AD|1=257}}
* {{ill|317|en|317|WD=Q32584|lt=317 AD|1=317}}
* {{ill|377|en|377|WD=Q48043|lt=377 AD|1=377}}
* {{ill|437|en|437|WD=Q31154|lt=437 AD|1=437}}
* {{ill|497|en|497|WD=Q30899|lt=497 AD|1=497}}
* {{ill|557|en|557|WD=Q31086|lt=557 AD|1=557}}
* {{ill|617|en|617|WD=Q31036|lt=617 AD|1=617}}
* {{ill|677|en|677|WD=Q30622|lt=677 AD|1=677}}
* {{ill|AD 737|en|AD 737|WD=Q23583|lt=737 AD|1=AD 737}}
* {{ill|797|en|797|WD=Q31902|lt=797 AD|1=797}}
* {{ill|857|en|857|WD=Q30374|lt=857 AD|1=857}}
* {{ill|917|en|917|WD=Q24802|lt=917 AD|1=917}}
* {{ill|977|en|977|WD=Q23795|lt=977 AD|1=977}}
|
* {{ill|1037|en|1037|WD=Q19335|lt=1037 AD|1=1037}}
* {{ill|1097|en|1097|WD=Q19488|lt=1097 AD|1=1097}}
* {{ill|1157|en|1157|WD=Q19654|lt=1157 AD|1=1157}}
* {{ill|1217|en|1217|WD=Q5379|lt=1217 AD|1=1217}}
* {{ill|1277|en|1277|WD=Q5531|lt=1277 AD|1=1277}}
* {{ill|1337|en|1337|WD=Q6039|lt=1337 AD|1=1337}}
* {{ill|1397|en|1397|WD=Q6410|lt=1397 AD|1=1397}}
* {{ill|1457|en|1457|WD=Q6518|lt=1457 AD|1=1457}}
* {{ill|1517|en|1517|WD=Q6263|lt=1517 AD|1=1517}}
* {{ill|1577|en|1577|WD=Q6704|lt=1577 AD|1=1577}}
* {{ill|1637|en|1637|WD=Q6889|lt=1637 AD|1=1637}}
* {{ill|1697|en|1697|WD=Q7702|lt=1697 AD|1=1697}}
* {{ill|1757|en|1757|WD=Q7635|lt=1757 AD|1=1757}}
* {{ill|1817|en|1817|WD=Q6958|lt=1817 AD|1=1817}}
* {{ill|1877|en|1877|WD=Q7773|lt=1877 AD|1=1877}}
* {{ill|1937|en|1937|WD=Q18647|lt=1937 AD|1=1937}}
* {{ill|1997|en|1997|WD=Q2088|lt=1997 AD|1=1997}}
|
* {{ill|2057 AD|ja|2057年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2057|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2057 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2117 AD|ja|2117年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2117|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2117 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2177 AD|ja|2177年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2177|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2177 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2237 AD|ja|2237年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2237|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2237 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2297 AD|ja|2297年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2297|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2297 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2357 AD|ja|2357年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2357|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2357 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 24世紀|1=24th century|WD=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2417 AD|ja|2417年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2417|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2417 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2477 AD|ja|2477年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2477|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2477 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2537 AD|ja|2537年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2537|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2537 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2597 AD|ja|2597年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2597|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2597 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2657 AD|ja|2657年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2657|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2657 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2717 AD|ja|2717年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2717|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2717 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2777 AD|ja|2777年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2777|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2777 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2837 AD|ja|2837年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2837|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2837 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2897 AD|ja|2897年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2897|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2897 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2957 AD|ja|2957年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2957|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2957 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yin Fire Ox==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|December|en|December|WD=Q126|lt=December|1=December}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Minor Cold|1=Xiaohan}} until the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Ox==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Teichuu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

 

[[zh-min-nan:Teng-chik]]
[[zh-yue:丁丑]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Fire Ox|qq=ja|丁丑|version=98657998|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Büffelvi]]
[[de:Yin Fire Ox]]

[[ja:丁丑]]

[[zh:丁丑]]
[[ko:정축]]
[[fr:Buffle de feu]]
[[de:Feuer-Büffel]]
[[af:Vuuros (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Büffelen]]
[[en:Fire Ox]]
[[fr:Buffle de feushak]]
[[it:Ding-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Đinh Sửu]]
[[za:Dingceij]]
[[ar:Yin Fire Ox]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Yin Fire Ox-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Dĭng-tiū]]
[[hak:Tên-chhiú]]
[[nds:Füür-Oss]]
[[za:Dingcouj]]
[[zh-classical:丁丑]]
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-thiú]]
[[zh-yue:丁丑]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Dĭng-tiū]]
[[hak:Tên-chhiú]]
[[nds:Füür-Oss]]
[[za:Dingcouj]]
[[zh-classical:丁丑]]
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-thiú]]
[[zh-yue:丁丑]]
{{wikidata link|Q1062543}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
